name: SKAKO A/S
summary: SKAKO A/S designs, develops, and sells concrete batching plants and vibratory equipment in North America, Europe, Africa, and internationally. It operates through SKAKO Concrete and SKAKO Vibration segments. The company offers admix materials, including synthetic fibers, powder pigment metering, steel fiber proportioning, and polyprophylene fibers; cleaning systems; concrete mixers comprising Atlantis and Rotoconix; CONFLEX bucket conveyors; consistency controls; control systems; and Distribeton overhead gantry products, as well as concrete plant solutions. It also provides vibratory feeders, washing drums, grizzly and storage feeders, lift tippers, packaging and weigh systems, hydraulic and gear tippers, heat treatment products, on-off systems, heavy and medium duty screens, densimetric tables, flip flows, electroplating systems, and sorting and inspection systems. In addition, the company provides spare parts and after-sales services. SKAKO A/S was founded in 1960 and is headquartered in Faaborg, Denmark.
